nasb.text: Now it happened that while he was performing his priestly service before God in the appointed order of his division,

esv.text: Now while he was serving as priest before God when his division was on duty,

cnv.text: 有一次，撒迦利亞在　神面前按著班次執行祭司的職務，

ccb.text: 有一天，轮到撒迦利亚他们那一班祭司当值，

csbs.text: 有一次，当撒迦利亚的班组轮值的时候，撒迦利亚在神面前履行祭司的职务，
